name: retrieve_team_profile_details
description: Retrieves all profile field definitions for a slack team, optionally filtered by visibility, to understand the team's profile structure.

visibility.description:
Filters profile fields by visibility. Use 'all' for all fields (default if unspecified), 'visible' for fields where 'is_hidden' is false/unset, or 'hidden' for fields where 'is_hidden' is true.
Examples:
  "all"
  "visible"
  "hidden"

arguments.description: Request schema to fetch team profile settings.
